feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enhancement in View profile
entry.content:
Plant Maintenance and Customer Service->Maintenance and Service Processing->Maintenance and Service Orders->Functions and Settings for Order Types->Basic Order View

How to check whether enhancement (like sub-screen, sub-tab, fields) can be done on view profile or NOT

entry.title: General Notification with Reference to Equipment / or better other Notification Type?
entry.content:
dear all,

in reference to this question:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-add-equipment-and-functional-fileds-in-general-notification-iqs21/qaq-p/9429283#feedback-error 

I have probably same requirement. The Business wants to manage the Process of purchasing/Leasing of Company Cars with Notifications and equipments, no Fleet Management so fair, just Basic Master Data in The Equipment Master and for beginning no maintenance/repair orders. The Notification should be used for mirroring the whole Process in different Stages. 

start of the Process is a requirement/allowance of having a Company car by a authorized Person. The Process ends when the car is Handed over to the new driver.

The Future driver of The car will ask for a Quote at a local dealer. The Person responsible for giving him Green light to take that Action should create an SAP Notification (General Notification Maybe) based on a Notification Template which already Contains some Tasks that are Linked with different Partners (Finance,purchase,HR). The tasks mirror the steps that Are necessary to complete the process. We want to use The Notification to Hand over The responsibilities During The process from One to The other. Each time a task is finished the responsible Person closes that task and in First step manually Starts the next task. With this we want to make visible where we are with a specific Notification (who is responsible and What are the Open tasks.)

in principle I would Like to use the General Notification Type but as fair as i found out,there is nomwas of linking an Equipment as Reference to that Notification? Can anyone confirm? This is because of the Notification category that determines the possible Screen areas of a Notification. Correct?

I would Like to link the Equipment, because in One specific Task of the Notification the Equipment Master has to be created and this would be the best time to link the Equipment to the Notification so we Can easily Identify the Status of One specific Company car procurement Process according to Equipment Master data e.g. Car Plate or Brand or driver and so on. With iw29. 

Any comments Are much appreciated,

feel free to ask for more Details,

 

Best regards

 

michael

entry.title: Required Enterprise Business Functions for S/4 HANA 2023 FPS2 PCE
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it mandatory that we must activate below business functions when migrating from EhP8 6.0 to S/4 HANA 2023 in SAP Enterprise Asset Management area?

At this moment not all Business Functions mentioned are active in ECC and we plan to move to S/4 HANA 2023.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4cef93946a0b48ec89533b3c34443b85/1655de4728664d1e9c99e9d3e67770a7.html

LOG_EAM_CI_1 to  LOG_EAM_CI_12
LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY to LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY_12
LOG_EAM_IME_1

Regards

Vineeth

entry.title: Suggestions on Updating Breakdown Notifications and Equipment Status
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am seeking your guidance regarding an issue we are currently facing. Our client requires daily updates of the breakdown status in the equipment user status. While the site team is already opening breakdown notifications, the client has proposed giving all end users access to IE02 for updating the user status daily.

However, granting end users this access could pose a significant risk, as it allows changes to the equipment master data. We currently have around 10 vehicles in breakdown status at a single site, and our organization operates approximately 35 sites.

From my understanding, daily updates to the user status are generally more applicable to production or manufacturing companies.

Could you please suggest the best procedure for updating breakdown notifications or equipment user status? Is providing IE02 access to all end users advisable, or is there an alternative, more secure approach we should consider?

entry.title: Implementation of Restrictions for Tyre and Battery Installation in SAP Equipment Master
entry.content:
Hie Experts,

We need to implement restrictions in SAP to ensure that only a limited number of tyres and batteries can be installed on equipment. If someone tyres to install an additional tyre or battery beyond the allowed limit, the system should prevent the installation.

For example, if one piece of equipment is allowed to have only 10 tyres, and an attempt is made to install an extra tyre, the system should block this action.

entry.title: Unable to generate PRs for operations in a Work Order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

A client is having an issue involving the creation of purchase requisitions for a subset of positions while creating a maintenance/work order.

As shown in image, the field Res/PurcRq is set to "From release" for both operation 0020 and 0040 when, instead, they should be set to Inmediately, as shown for positions 0030 and 0050.

The purchase requisitions are created interspersedly.

The user is unable to modify this field.

A deeper view into operation/position 0020 shows no creation of a PR.

Meanwhile, operation 0030 does, indeed, shows a PR being created.

Customizing for both QAS and PRD.

Also, is there a link between Control Keys and Purchase Requisition creation?

Thanks in advance,

Sebastián

entry.title: Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution Feedback
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for some feedback on best practices for an SAP Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution implementation.

We would appreciate any feedback you can provide on your experience to the following questions (and anything else you would be willing to share):

  1. How long did it take to implement the solution?
  2. Which version/release did you implement
  3. Did you use a partner or internal resources (for entire implementation or for various phases; e.g. project management, system setup, configuration, training)?
  4. Any Lessons learned?

We have a relatively small footprint and only looking to implement at 2 plants.

Thanks in advance,

Bob

entry.title: Authorisation 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

please not, we have the following authorisation requirement.

There are different types of maintenance order types like PM01, SM01 etc.

A user should be able to cancle the business completiton ('Revoke status "Closed") only for order type SM01.

I created a PFCG-role only with authorisation for IW32. In my role I have authorization object 'I_VORG_ORD' =>field: order type = SM01, field: BETRVORG = BUAB ('Revoke status "Closed").

I assigned the role to my test user. Unfortunately, the user can now 'Revoke status "Closed" in both order types, not for only SM01, as  expected.

Please advise how can I achive the restriction that the user can only 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type.

Feedback is highly appreciated!

Best Regards and thanks in advance.

Magdalena

entry.title: Equipment Valid from & to
entry.content:
Equipment is available at Plant 2 from 01.01.2025 to 10.01.2025 at location 1133.The same equipment is available from 11.01.2025 to 31.01.9999 at location 1118.When searching for equipment at location 1118 for the date range 01.02.2025 to 28.02.2025, the system should show availability only for Plant 2 during that range.

The equipment’s availability data, including the start and end dates, is stored in the V_Fleet table.

We need logic for ABAP.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

SAP Plant Connectivity SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management

entry.title: Maintenance plan was not scheduled - Error
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have equipment and that has two counters – Hours and Fuel consumption.

Maintenance order need to be created once it reaches every 1000 hours or 2000 liters. (Multiple counter - OR condition).

We created multiple counter plan.

Measurement reading entered as 1 for both counter and schedueld the maintenance plan.

Now counter - 241 value entered as 1001.

Call was scheduled as it reached one of the counter.

Now I updated counter - 240 value as 2100.

Now if I try to schedule the plan using IP10 and IP30. Error will come as Maintenance plan was not scheduled.

 

We are not able to proceed further. Please suggest the configuration or master data set up that I missed 

If it was a standard behaviour. Kindly suggest us the alternative solution.

entry.title: Missing Work Center plant field under IP18 Output.
entry.content:
Missing "Work Center plant" field under IP18 standard SAP Output. There is no configuration can be done on this.

Please advise as we are trying to avoid to build a custom report on this.

entry.title: Operation level costing to header level costing reversal impact on business process
entry.content:
Hi 

Please suggest what are the effect if we de-activate OLC and made reversal from operation level cost to header level 

Please let me know possible effects or it will impact on other scenario.

entry.title: Maintenance Item long text at IP17
entry.content:
Dear All , 

Greetings !

I am working on SAP RISE environment . Need to extract maintenance item long text . I can display long text individually at t-code IP17 . Is there any feature available to extract long text of maintenance item en masse ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards

entry.title: Equipment installation to Functional location does not trigger stock movement for related material
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I`m currently working on a Serialization tasks and having an issue with no stock movement being triggered once equipment is installed to a Functional location. 

We have a material with serial number assigned with stock in the plant, then same material is populated in the Consttype field in the Equipment master data and once we try to install the Equipment to a Functional location in the Structure tab, no stock movement is being triggered to consume the part. 

Any ideas will be highly appreciated

entry.title: Mass change of equipment user status
entry.content:
Hi All,

I was trying to perform mass change of equipment user status ( with & without status no having radio button & checkbox button ) using LSMW program but was not successful ( probably due to radio /check box button of user status ) . Can any one please suggest what extra care I need to take while recording LSMW in this scenario ?

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: Unable to post blogs
entry.content: Hello, I cannot post any blogs; the button is disabled for me. PLease help me with the possible solution. Thanks.

entry.title: Equipment- Partner Function Update
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Is there any standard t-code available for mass update of partner function with partner no for a list of equipment ? I prepared one LSMW but it is not working . It is deleting previous partner function & partner no for each equipment . Supposing for equipment no 123 , I need to update partner function "PR" & partner no A, B, C . My LSMW is updating only C in equipment master & deleting previous partner no A, B . Can anyone please suggest .

Thanking you .

entry.title: Need to remove trailing Zeros (after decimal) from the work duration in PM order operation data
entry.content:
Members  ,

In Maintenance work order operation tab (Fiori app) app, the duration is converted to decimal value with trailing zeros automatically by system. we need not to have this. Requirement is to see the value (without decimal) only unless the decimal value is specified in a field specifically by the user. System must always show without decimal value in all the apps for maintenance order operations

Currently it's showing it differently for different FIORI apps. Please let me know how to fix this.

entry.title: Revisions IWR1 - How to stop Work Order assignment once Major Outage scope is frozen.
entry.content:
IWR1 Revisions are used for our Major Outages. In the Outage process there is a time when the scope is frozen and no more Work Orders can be assigned to the Revision. Does anyone know of a way to stop Work Orders being assigned to a certain Revision?

My thought process was User status authorisation and activate user exits to help stop assignment to Work Orders once a certain User Status is assigned to the Revision in IWR1. The issue I am facing is the User Status for Revisions has no configuration path in SPRO that I can see so I can't configure them. It looks the same as all the other User Statuses but will not accept any of the Status Profiles.

If anyone has any ideas it would be much appreciated

entry.title: Asset Management, Corrective Maintenance Order Type
entry.content:
Hello all,

When reviewing the test script for Corrective Maintenance (BH1), it specifies that when performing Assign Order > Create Order for Notification, I should select the order type "Corrective Maintenance YBA1."

However, according to the site below

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2dfa044a255f49e89a3050daf3c61c11/5fbd47786341411992fc9915284da2b2.html?locale=en-US

I should use the order types that are not processed according to the phase model, and those items are deprecated.

 

Since order type is mandatory when assigning order, which type should I choose instead? 

 

Thank you.
